description:
2021 Mercedes GLE 63 S AMG Coupe, 4.0 TC V8, AWD, 603bhp, 9 Speed Automatic. AED 339,000 or AED 5,311 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 58,118 KM's - 12 Months Blackline Warranty - Full Mercedes Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Obsidian Black Metallic - Keyless Entry - Keyless Start - Sports Seats - Power Adjustable Front Seats - Memory Function on Front Seats - Heated and Cooled Front Seats - Blind Spot Warning - Burmester Premium Surround Sound System - Multifunction Steering Wheel - Surround Parking Sensors - Rear View Camera - Electronic Front Seats with Memory Function - Electronic Panoramic Roof - Park Assist - Soft Close Doors - Wireless Charging Pad - Cruise Control - Selective Drive Modes - Adjustable Ride Heights - LED Headlights - Apple CarPlay - Navigation - Bluetooth - 4 Zone Climate Control - Voice Control - USB-C Ports
